overview: Dhatu-Scan is a privacy-first AI-powered Progressive Web App for early detection of child malnutrition. It uses smartphone camera analysis, WHO growth standards, dietary risk scoring, and gamification to help parents, caregivers, NGOs, and healthcare workers identify at-risk children early.
features: Camera-based body analysis with pose guidance overlay
WHO Z-score simulation and malnutrition risk scoring
Results dashboard with circular gauges and recommendation cards
Growth history tracking with trend charts
Gamification with badges, XP points, and level progression
Privacy-first on-device processing with face masking
Offline-capable PWA with local data storage
Glassmorphism premium UI with dark mode
Mobile-first responsive design with bottom navigation
